feedback.text: Student of the Jean Monnet Modules project “DERECHO”: ‘Defense of European Rights and Excellence for Consumers HHarmonisation’, No 101239437. Project financed by the European Union. Jean Monnet Actions in the field of Higher Education: Modules. Call for tenders ERASMUS-JMO-2025-HEI-TCH-RSCH. The Digital Fairness Act is a necessary and positive measure in a society that is increasingly dependent on digital. Its focus on transparency, technological ethics and equal treatment makes it an important step towards a more responsible use of technology. However, its success will depend on how it is implemented in practice: it should be applied flexibly, without curbing innovation or overburdening businesses. If it strikes that balance, the law can put Europe as a global standard-setter in fair digital regulation and in defence of citizens’ rights in the technological environment.
